case_title: MICHELLE BOSCH VS. SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INCORPORATED

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: MELINDA REDERSON] FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSCH, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INCORPORATED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED. SERVED JUN-12-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INCORPORATED
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JPT FILED BY BOSCH, MICHELLE SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INCORPORATED
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INCORPORATED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-22-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BOSCH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,670.00 FILED BY BOSCH, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DANIELLE BROWN, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INCORPORATED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSCH, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INCORPORATED $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,075.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $3000 FOR LOST USE OF THE APARTMENT, FOOD EXPENSE WHILE UNABLE TO USE THE APARTMENT, REIMBURSEMENT FOR OTHER APARTMENT EXPENSES PAID WHILE APARTMENT WAS UNUSABLE AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS DAMAGES, PLUS $75 IN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BOSCH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MAHESH KUMAR. DEFENDANT SEQUOIA EQUITIES, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIELLE BROWN, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2023 - JUDGMENT.
